Common causes:
  - installed via `pip install git+https://...` without the .dvc metadata needed to rebuild from source;
  - LSMS_DATA_DIR points to an empty or stale cache location;
  - DVC credentials are missing or misconfigured;
  - the raw .dta source files have not been dvc-pulled.
